meaning: adj.浆果的,浆果状的,有卵的
examples: He leapt up lightly, arranged the REINS, and was gone between the tall red-berried hedges.
The white berried grape with which are produced the most famous wines of Sardinia certainly is Vermentino.
A dry red full bodied with generous red-berried fruits on the palate and subtle French and American oak influence.
